CONTENT.International career: Šuler earned his first cap for Slovenia in a friendly match against Hungary on 26 March 2008. He scored his first goal on 20 August 2008 in a friendly against Croatia. Šuler earned a total of 39 caps, scoring 3 goals.

SUMMARY: Marko Šuler (Slovene pronunciation: [ˈmarko ˈʃulər]; born 9 March 1983) is a Slovenian former professional footballer who played as a centre-back. Besides Slovenia, he has played in Belgium, Israel, and Poland.
